Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: FLW Touring Pro Roy Hawk joins Jarrett at beautiful Lake Havasu in Arizona for some post spawn bassin’
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The gang from Sport Fishing TV chase big fish feeding on mullet swarms.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On this week's show, we're gonna be talking about some timely fishing techniques for fishing in the heat of summer. It's late July and fishing is very good for a variety of different species all across the Upper Midwest. We're gonna share with you some great tactics for walleye, largemouth bass, smallmouth bass and muskie, with special guests Brian Brosdahl, James Lindner and Jeremy Smith.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Edge - Fishing Techniques for the Dog Days of Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith outdoors we hit the big lake michigan in search for some lake trout. We go far wiht this big booat! dont want to miss this one
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Michigan Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Breaking the Law
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Breaking the Law
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fun, fun, fun, in the Mexico sun. In last week's episode, we arrived at Cedros Island and went Yellowtail fishing. Coming out of the gates, the Yellowtail were hungry and wanted to eat everything. This week Shea McIntee and some of the crew decided to mix it up and drive to another local island called Isla de San Benito, about two hours away, to see what it's all about.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and James Lindner target Summer Peak largemouth bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Primetime Summer Largemouth Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace spend the day on Lake Vermilion catching smallmouth bass in the shallows on classic tubes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Shallow Water Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: If you're a bass fisherman, you have most likely heard of the world-class Lake El Salto. Dave Brown from Okuma Fishing Tackle and professional bass fisherman Todd Kline rally up with Savage Gear and test out their rat and duck lures on this Stoked On Fishing adventure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Largemouth Bass Fishing at Lake El Salto, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul, Perry, and Dan head east of Timmins to the historic waters of Frederick House Lake for a late-season ice adventure under warm, spring-like skies. What starts as a perfect day on the hardwater quickly turns into a multispecies showcase—pike, perch, walleye, and sauger all keep the crew busy as the bite fires up. But as Northern Ontario weather often reminds us, conditions shift fast. With the wind picking up and clouds rolling in, the team wraps up an incredible day and makes their way home, grateful for one more memorable outing before the thaw.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake

Video.summary: One of the best parts of traveling is the pleasant surprises that come along every trip. In last week's episode, Shea McIntee and the crew had a remarkable day of Marlin fishing in Madalena Bay. Now we find out Madalena Bay doesn't only have fantastic offshore fishing, it also has inshore fishing that is out of this world. Shea's captain takes us to some of his favorite spots to catch Red Snapper, Snook, Corbina, and a fish we have never seen before, Palometa.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - The Magdalena Bay Experience, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe South Florida Canals1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - South Florida Canals1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe South Georgia Showdown_rd
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: At Venice, Louisiana, Shaw fishes with renowned captain Mike Frenette for trophy redfish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: See all the greatest destinations and trophy fish from the Sport Fishing TV team in 2024.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sport Fishing TV | The Best of 2024
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's late June and right now it's primetime for hot river fishing across the Upper Midwest for a variety of different reasons. Number one would be the low stable flows of the rivers, most of the rivers are also running fairly clear. Number two is it puts fish in fairly identifiable areas in the river thanks to the current. Today's guests is Captain Ben Wolfe of Sport Fish Michigan who targets a wide variety of fish throughout the river systems of Michigan.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro Vs Joe Lake Apache
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lifelong cowboy and Oklahoma native Bill Parker is believed to be the 1st man to reach the shores of Normandy on D-day…June 6th 1944.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lunker redfish put tackle to the test on jetties of the Mississippi River Delta in Louisiana.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week's show we're finally back on the ice and nothing better to make sure all your gear is set to go without bringing everything on about 3 inches of ice safety is everything!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.
Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.
Larry Smith Outdoors | First Ice 130+ Flags in the U.P.

Video.summary: Larry delivers loads of tips and tricks on catching walleye.
Video.title: Walleye Slam 2022

Video.summary: This past summer (2019), we met a new friend Jason, the CEO of the Catalina Island medical center in the city of Avalon. Jason mentioned that he was in charge of a campaign for the Catalina Island Medical Center Foundation. This campaign aims to raise money to build Catalina Island, a much-needed, state-of-the-art medical center. Jason asked us if we could be one of the big-ticket auction items from the list. We would provide a three-night stay on the stoked on a fishing yacht, two days of fishing on our Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot everglades, and provide fantastic food and drinks when we arrived back in Avalon. We love Catalina, and the idea of creating a hospital for the future of the Island was a no-brainer. We couldn't let this great opportunity go to waste and had epic two days of fishing in San Clemente Island with some new friends.
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip
Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip
Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bass fishing in late summer can be tough, watch as Dusing shows ways to overcome the tough conditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Late Summer Bass Smash
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dusitn takes on classic Fall conditions explaining the best ways to approach bass throughout the day.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how easy it is to build 3 different fish catching spinnerbaits.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Welcome to La Paz, the captivating capital of Baja California Sur, situated approximately 3/4 of the way down the breathtaking Baja Peninsula. La Paz is renowned for its stunning seafront beaches, lush parks, vibrant art scene, and waterfront dining that will leave you mesmerized. Join us as we embark on a thrilling adventure diving into this coastal paradise for the very first time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | The Ultimate Baja Mexico Fishing Trip: Stoked on La Paz – Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join Stoked On Fishing as we embark on a thrilling 6-day fishing expedition to the enchanted Island of Puerto Rico. Nestled along the west coast, we'll be based in the charming fishing town of La Pargueta and fishing along the west coast locations of Cabo Rojo and Rincon. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure filled with wide-open offshore and inshore fishing. Stoked On Puerto Rico
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | A Fisherman's Paradise: Stoked on Puerto Rico
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're returning to one of our all-time favorite destinations in Baja, Mexico - Cedros Island, with Jose and Cedros Outdoor Adventures. People often ask us, 'Why do you return to Cedros Island?' The answer is straightforward: the fishing is absolutely ridiculous almost every single time. Our Stoked on Fishing charter makes a point of showing up in the middle of October for a reason. That reason? It's all about the variety of species available to catch, starting with yellowfin tuna, dorado, halibut, and the elusive Mr. Yellowtail. It's game time - let's go fishing in Baja!
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Cedros Island Goes Off, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes brackish water for bass amd stipers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks fishing and social media with Foundation Outdoors media expert Jake Hutcheson.
Video.title: Episode 1
